title: Vice President, Information Technology
description_text: Executive technology leadership role owning enterprise systems, infrastructure, security, and digital transformation.

title: Vice President, Sales
description_text: Executive sales leadership role focused on pipeline growth, territory expansion, and revenue operations.

title: Intern, Biostatistics
description_text: Internship supporting biostatistics and clinical data review.
notes: Far below target level and wrong function.

title: Assistant Vice President, Technology Strategy and Operations
description_text: Technology strategy and operations role supporting executive planning, governance, and enterprise delivery.
notes: Adjacent leadership title worth review, not an automatic skip.

title: Director, Information Technology
description_text: Owns IT operations, enterprise applications, and vendor management for a distributed business.
notes: Strong function fit but below ideal level.
